g.text: Aduna SDK FE High level flow
User authenticated proceed to next AuthN step
proceed to Number Verification as 2FA method
Request AuthN/CSP invocation data from BE
Communicate the error to ASP app
The selection of method is done based on:
If there is not match to both factors, error is returned.
SBA Preferred: Apply SIM-based if data available, else Network-based AuthN
NBA Preferred: Apply Network-based if available, else SIM-based AuthN
SBA: The only applicable method is SIM-based AuthN
NBA: The only applicable method is Network-based AuthN
Communicate the error to ASP app
Communicate the retrieved operator token to BE
- Authorize Network API for the app based on Operator Token
- Apply Number Verification or Number retrieval
Number Verification or Number Retrieval Result
- Authorize Network API for the app based on Agg_code and code
Number verification result or Any Error result
